channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Anthropic Updates Responsible Scaling Policy to Address Catastrophic Risks in AI
item.description: Anthropic updates its Responsible Scaling Policy (RSP) to address catastrophic risks from frontier AI systems, emphasizing safety and security measures as the company pushes to be perceived as an AI safety first provider.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
